data.Title: CORR:  Assets:
data.Description: Provide most recent asset statement(s) to support sufficient funds to close and reserves. Require a total of $132,314.27 which includes $13,163.46 in reserves (which do not have to be liquid).  **The provide EVOD is acceptable but expires in 3 business days and prior to our closing.

data.Title: CORR:  Property: Insurance - Hazard
data.Description: **10/24 (BR) EFFECTIVE DATE MUST BE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTE DATE AS THIS IS A PURCHASE** Provide evidence of hazard insurance with sufficient coverage to support lesser of the loan amount or replacement cost. Wind/Hail must be included, or a separate policy required. Loss payee to reflect: Lender's Name, ISAOA with loan number and endorsement(s).

data.Title: Credit:  Verification of Rent is required
data.Description: Provide a VOR documenting the most recent 12 months housing payment history along with 6 cancelled checks (if private party)

data.Title: Income:
data.Description: *** (LA) 10/27 - Letter must state that the partner is aware that the business account is being used to qualify for a mortgage. Also, must specify the business account number(s) being used.  (Require letter from partner acknowledging the fact that the borrower is using business assets to qualify for loan).

data.Title: Income:  NonQM -Verify minimum 25% ownership interest in the Business
data.Description: Income: Verify that the borrower is at least 25% owner of the business by providing one of the following: CPA letter, operating agreement, or equivalent reflecting the borrower's ownership percentage.
